misconceptions: Assuming parliamentary systems always mean weak executives
Treating China/Iran as identical “authoritarian” without institutional nuance
Mixing electoral system type with party system outcome without mechanism
paper_rules: Always ground comparisons in the six course countries when prompted
FRQs include conceptual analysis, quantitative analysis, and country comparisons
Define AP course concepts precisely before applying
Use causal language carefully (institutional design → political outcome)
units_summary: U1 Political Systems Regimes and Governments (w≈0.18, q=90)
U3 Political Culture and Participation (w≈0.2, q=100)
U4 Party and Electoral Systems (w≈0.2, q=100)
U5 Political and Economic Change (w≈0.2, q=100)
